form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Novice race on March 3 over 488m at Mandurah behind Dodgy Bear beaten 12 lengths (28.69). Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a slick early split last time and went on to clock 17.41 as a strongly fancied winner over 300m at Mandurah. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.
